content.text: I'll help you check your container resources using the Mittwald MCP tools. Let me start by discovering the available projects and containers.

input.description: Get container resource allocation and usage
input.prompt:
The user wants to see their current container resource allocation and usage using Mittwald MCP tools. 

First, discover what projects and containers are available. Then retrieve detailed resource information. Make reasonable choices for parameters - for example, if there are multiple projects, show resources for all of them or the most active one.

Use the Mittwald MCP API endpoints to:
1. List available projects
2. List containers in those projects
3. Get detailed resource allocation and usage metrics for the containers

Present the results in a clear, organized format showing allocation limits and current usage.

content.text:

input.description: List MCP tools related to projects, containers, and resources
Find TypeScript files in the project
Find TypeScript files in src directory

input.command: cd /Users/robert/Code/mittwald-mcp && claude mcp inspect mittwald 2>&1 | grep -E "(container|project|resource)" -i | head -30
input.description: Inspect MCP tools for container/project/resource commands
